description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body, predominantly covered in dark brown feathers along its back and wings, and a lighter grayish coloration on its head and nape. The beak is short, conical, and yellowish, typical of many urban passerine birds. The eyes are pale and somewhat featureless, giving the bird a lifeless or taxidermied appearance. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is straight and tapers to a subtle point. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body or not modeled. The overall form is compact and smooth, with no pronounced feather patterning except for the color transition between the head and body.
description: A small, dark brown bird with a grayish head and a short yellow beak, featuring a smooth, streamlined body and subtle color transitions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's dark brown body, gray head, and yellow beak, with wings folded and tail extending straight back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tapered tail and the symmetrical folding of the wings along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the same color pattern and body shape from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the gray head, yellow beak, and the smooth, rounded contour of the bird's chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark brown body with a grayish head and nape, no distinct markings or bars.
